member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IMobPresetService
member.summary: Abstraction for accessing mob presets from the core project. Implementations can fetch presets from EF, files, or other stores.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IMobPresetService.GetRandomAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Selects a random from the available presets, optionally excluding a set of preset ids. Returns null when no preset could be chosen (for example, when all presets are excluded).
member.param: Optional set of preset ids to exclude from selection.
Cancellation token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A randomly selected , or null if none available.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IPlayerRepository
member.summary: Repository interface used by core services to load and persist player state. This abstraction keeps the core logic free of EF/Discord-specific types.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IPlayerRepository.GetByIdAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a by its identifier or null when not found.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IPlayerRepository.GetOrCreateAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerId,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an existing or creates a new persistent record when none exists. The returned should be tracked for updates by callers.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IPlayerRepository.UpdateAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes to a player's state.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IPlayerRepository.GetTopPlayersByTotalLevelAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the top players ordered by total level (sum of all skills).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IPlayerRepository.GetTopPlayersByHighestDungeonAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the top players ordered by their highest dungeon reached.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Data.IPlayerRepository.GetTopPlayersByGoldAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the top players ordered by total gold earned.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext`1
member.summary: Provides context for combat action resolution. Contains the current actor, all combatants, and the message log for the round.
member.typeparam: The type of the current actor ( or ).
member.param: Current dungeon level (affects damage scaling and XP rewards).
All players in combat (mutable - may be modified during action resolution).
All mobs in combat (mutable - may be modified during action resolution).
Combat log messages generated during this round (append-only).

member.summary: Provides context for combat action resolution. Contains the current actor, all combatants, and the message log for the round.
member.typeparam: The type of the current actor ( or ).
member.param: Current dungeon level (affects damage scaling and XP rewards).
All players in combat (mutable - may be modified during action resolution).
All mobs in combat (mutable - may be modified during action resolution).
Combat log messages generated during this round (append-only).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext`1.Level
member.summary: Current dungeon level (affects damage scaling and XP rewards).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext`1.Actor
member.summary: The entity currently taking action.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext`1.Players
member.summary: All players in combat (mutable - may be modified during action resolution).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext`1.Mobs
member.summary: All mobs in combat (mutable - may be modified during action resolution).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext`1.Messages
member.summary: Combat log messages generated during this round (append-only).

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.IAlive
member.summary: Represents an entity that can be alive or dead.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.IAlive.IsAlive
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the entity is alive.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobId
member.summary: Strongly-typed identifier for a mob instance or preset. Using a distinct type improves clarity and prevents mixing IDs with plain integers.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobId.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Strongly-typed identifier for a mob instance or preset. Using a distinct type improves clarity and prevents mixing IDs with plain integers.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobId.ToString
member.summary: Returns the numeric value of the mob id as a string.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobPresetDto
member.summary: Lightweight DTO representing a mob preset for use by core logic. Keeps core independent from EF entity types.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobPresetDto.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Lightweight DTO representing a mob preset for use by core logic. Keeps core independent from EF entity types.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState
member.summary: Represents a mob's state during combat. This is a mutable class that changes during combat rounds.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for this mob instance or preset mapping.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState.Name
member.summary: Display name of the mob.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState.MaxHp
member.summary: Maximum hit points for the mob.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState.CurrentHp
member.summary: Current hit points during combat.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState.AttackPower
member.summary: Offensive power level used when calculating damage.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState.ImageUrl
member.summary: Optional URL for an image representing this mob.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState.IsAlive
member.summary: Whether the mob is alive (CurrentHp > 0).

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction
member.summary: Actions a player can choose during a round.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction.Attack
member.summary: Perform a physical attack against a mob.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction.Magic
member.summary: Cast a magic spell (damage/heal) against a mob or ally.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction.Talk
member.summary: Use speech/diplomacy to attempt to defeat or influence a mob.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction.Pray
member.summary: Attempt a risky action with a chance for big effect (pray).

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction.Heal
member.summary: Heal an ally.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction.Run
member.summary: Attempt to flee from combat.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerId
member.summary: Strongly-typed player identifier.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerId.#ctor(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Strongly-typed player identifier.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState
member.summary: Represents a player's state during combat. This is a mutable class that changes during combat rounds. Combat stats are calculated from individual skill levels.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the player (Discord user ID for humans, generated for bots).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.Name
member.summary: Display name of the player.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.MaxHp
member.summary: Maximum hit points for the player (derived from Defense skill and progression).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.CurrentHp
member.summary: Current hit points during combat.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.AttackPower
member.summary: Offensive power derived from Attack skill level.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.MagicPower
member.summary: Magical power derived from Magic skill level.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.SpeechPower
member.summary: Speech power derived from Speech skill level (affects Talk actions).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.DefensePower
member.summary: Defensive power derived from Defense skill level (reduces incoming damage).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.Skills
member.summary: The player's individual skill levels. Skills level up by using them in combat.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.GoldEarned
member.summary: Gold earned during this session. Will be added to persistent total after session ends.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.MobsKilled
member.summary: Number of mobs killed during this session. Will be added to persistent total after session ends.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.AttackXpEarned
member.summary: Attack XP earned during this session.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.MagicXpEarned
member.summary: Magic XP earned during this session.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.SpeechXpEarned
member.summary: Speech XP earned during this session.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.DefenseXpEarned
member.summary: Defense XP earned during this session.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.AttackXpTotal
member.summary: Total Attack XP stored in persistence (lifetime).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.MagicXpTotal
member.summary: Total Magic XP stored in persistence (lifetime).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.SpeechXpTotal
member.summary: Total Speech XP stored in persistence (lifetime).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.DefenseXpTotal
member.summary: Total Defense XP stored in persistence (lifetime).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.TotalGold
member.summary: Total gold accumulated across all sessions (persistent).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.TotalKills
member.summary: Total mobs killed across all sessions (persistent).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.HighestDungeonLevel
member.summary: Highest dungeon level reached (persistent).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.TotalDeaths
member.summary: Total deaths across all sessions.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.CreatedAt
member.summary: Timestamps persisted for the player record.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.LastActiveAt
member.summary: Timestamp of the player's last activity (used for cleanup/idle detection).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.IsBot
member.summary: Indicates whether this player is an AI companion bot. Bots participate in combat but do not receive loot or XP rewards.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.IsAlive
member.summary: Whether the player is currently alive (HP > 0).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.CombatLevel
member.summary: Combined "combat level" for display (average of all skills).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState.TotalLevel
member.summary: Total of all skill levels.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel
member.summary: Lightweight value type representing a power level for stats (attack/magic/etc.).

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel.MinLevel
member.summary: Minimum allowed level (inclusive).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel.Value
member.summary: Numeric value of the power level.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new ensuring the value is not below .

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel.op_LessThan(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel)
member.summary: Determines whether one is less than another.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel.op_GreaterThan(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel)
member.summary: Determines whether one is greater than another.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel.op_LessThanOrEqual(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel)
member.summary: Determines whether one is less than or equal to another.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel.op_GreaterThanOrEqual(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel)
member.summary: Determines whether one is greater than or equal to another.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PowerLevel.ToString
member.summary: Returns the numeric representation as a string.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.RoundResult
member.summary: Result of executing a single combat round. Contains the updated state of all combatants and a log of events.
member.remarks: The collections are read-only views of the state after the round completed. Player and mob states reflect any damage taken, XP earned, or deaths that occurred.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.RoundResult.Level
member.summary: The dungeon level at which this round was executed.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.RoundResult.Players
member.summary: All players after the round (may include dead players and newly added bots).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.RoundResult.Mobs
member.summary: All mobs after the round (may include dead mobs).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.RoundResult.Messages
member.summary: Chronological log of combat events and messages generated during the round. Suitable for display to users.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.SkillType
member.summary: Skill types that can be leveled by players. Shared public enum used across handlers and services.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.SkillType.Attack
member.summary: Attack skill (physical damage).

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.SkillType.Magic
member.summary: Magic skill (spells/healing).

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.SkillType.Speech
member.summary: Speech skill (diplomacy/talk actions).

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.SkillType.Defense
member.summary: Defense skill (damage mitigation and HP scaling).

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService
member.summary: Provides localized/narrative text for combat actions using random templates from settings.
member.remarks: Centralizes all narrative and feedback text for player and mob actions.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IRandomNumberGenerator,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings})
member.summary: Provides localized/narrative text for combat actions using random templates from settings.
member.remarks: Centralizes all narrative and feedback text for player and mob actions.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetTeaserMessage
member.summary: Gets a teaser message for the start of an adventure.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetAttackMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized attack message.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetAttackCritMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized critical attack message.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetAttackNothingMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed attack.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetMagicMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized magic attack message.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetMagicCritMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized critical magic attack message.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetMagicNoTargetMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed magic attack.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetTalkNoTargetMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed talk action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetTalkSuccessMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a successful talk action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetTalkFailMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed talk action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetPrayNoTargetMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed pray action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetPraySuccessMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a successful pray action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetPrayFailMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed pray action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetPrayHealMessage(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a successful pray heal.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetRunSuccessMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a successful run action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetRunFailMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed run action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetRunFailOutnumberedMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed run action due to being outnumbered.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetMobAttackMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a mob attack.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetDamageReducedMessage(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for damage reduction.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetMobKilledMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a mob being killed.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetLootMessage(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for loot earned from a mob.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetLootRemainderMessage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for loot remainder distribution.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetPartyLootSummaryMessage(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for party loot summary.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetPlayerKilledMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a player being killed by a mob.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetHealMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a successful heal action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionLocalizationService.GetHealNoTargetMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a localized message for a failed heal action.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ActionResolutionService
member.summary: Resolves combat actions by delegating to specialized action handlers. Uses the Strategy pattern - each action type has its own handler implementation.

remarks.para: This service acts as a dispatcher, routing player and mob actions to the appropriate handlers. All game logic is contained within the individual action handlers.
At construction time, validates that all enum values have corresponding handlers to catch configuration errors early.

member.summary: Creates a new ActionResolutionService with the provided handlers.
member.param: Collection of player action handlers (one per action type).
member.exception: Thrown if any PlayerAction enum value lacks a handler.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.AttackActionHandler
member.summary: Handles the Attack action - physical damage with critical hit chance.
Handles the Attack action - physical damage with critical hit chance.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.HealActionHandler
member.summary: Handles the Heal action - restore HP to an injured ally. Cannot heal self; targets a random injured ally.
Handles the Heal action - restore HP to an injured ally. Cannot heal self; targets a random injured ally.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.IMobActionHandler
member.summary: Handles mob attack execution.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.IMobActionHandler.Execute(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState})
member.summary: Executes the mob's attack action.
member.param: The current combat state with the mob as actor.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.IPlayerActionHandler
member.summary: Handles execution of a specific player action in combat. Each action type (Attack, Magic, etc.) has its own handler implementation.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.IPlayerActionHandler.Action
member.summary: The action type this handler processes.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.IPlayerActionHandler.Execute(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState})
member.summary: Executes the action within the given combat context.
member.param: The current combat state including actor, targets, and message log.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.MagicActionHandler
member.summary: Handles the Magic action - magical damage with critical hit chance.
Handles the Magic action - magical damage with critical hit chance.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.MobActionHandler
member.summary: Handles mob attack actions - targets players with preference for lowest HP.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.MobActionHandler.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService)
member.summary: Handles mob attack actions - targets players with preference for lowest HP.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PlayerActionHandlerBase
member.summary: Base class for player action handlers providing common functionality.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PlayerActionHandlerBase.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService)
member.summary: Base class for player action handlers providing common functionality.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PlayerActionHandlerBase.Calculator
member.summary: Calculator used for combat math (damage, loot, etc.).

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PlayerActionHandlerBase.Localization
member.summary: Localization service used to produce user-facing messages.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PlayerActionHandlerBase.Progression
member.summary: Progression service used to award XP and calculate level-related values.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PlayerActionHandlerBase.AwardSkillXp(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.SkillType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Awards XP for using a skill. Bots do not receive XP.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PlayerActionHandlerBase.AwardKill(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState},Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState)
member.summary: Awards a kill to the actor and distributes loot.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PlayerActionHandlerBase.AwardLoot(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState},Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState)
member.summary: Distributes loot from a defeated mob to alive human players.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.PrayActionHandler
member.summary: Handles the Pray action - chance to instantly kill a mob (Divine Smite), or heal self if the prayer fails.
Handles the Pray action - chance to instantly kill a mob (Divine Smite), or heal self if the prayer fails.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.RunActionHandler
member.summary: Handles the Run action - attempt to flee from combat. Success chance is modified by HP status and being outnumbered.
Handles the Run action - attempt to flee from combat. Success chance is modified by HP status and being outnumbered.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Actions.TalkActionHandler
member.summary: Handles the Talk action - attempt to defeat a mob through diplomacy. Success chance is based on SpeechPower vs mob's AttackPower.
Handles the Talk action - attempt to defeat a mob through diplomacy. Success chance is based on SpeechPower vs mob's AttackPower.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.BotService
member.summary: Default implementation of . Creates AI companions with level-scaled stats and simple combat AI.

remarks.para: Bot ID Strategy: Bot IDs count down from ulong.MaxValue to avoid collision with Discord user IDs (which are smaller snowflake values).
AI Decision Tree: Bots prioritize healing injured allies, then self-preservation, then offensive actions weighted toward physical attacks.

member.param: Random number generator for stat variance and AI decisions.
Logger for bot generation and AI decision events.

member.summary: Default implementation of . Creates AI companions with level-scaled stats and simple combat AI.

remarks.para: Bot ID Strategy: Bot IDs count down from ulong.MaxValue to avoid collision with Discord user IDs (which are smaller snowflake values).
AI Decision Tree: Bots prioritize healing injured allies, then self-preservation, then offensive actions weighted toward physical attacks.

member.param: Random number generator for stat variance and AI decisions.
Logger for bot generation and AI decision events.

member.name: F:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.BotService._nextBotId
member.summary: Next bot ID to assign. Counts down from ulong.MaxValue to avoid Discord ID collisions.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.BotService.CreateBot(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a single bot with stats scaled to the dungeon level. Applies random variance to make bots feel more unique.
member.param: Pool of unused bot names. Modified to remove selected name.
member.returns: A new bot PlayerState ready for combat.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.BotService.SelectBotName(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Selects a name for a new bot from the available pool. Removes the selected name from the pool to prevent duplicates. Falls back to a generic numbered name if all names are exhausted.
member.param: Pool of unused names. Modified to remove selected name.
member.returns: The selected bot name.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.CombatCalculator
member.summary: Default implementation of combat calculations using configurable settings.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.CombatCalculator.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IRandomNumberGenerator,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings})
member.summary: Default implementation of combat calculations using configurable settings.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.DamageApplier
member.summary: Default implementation of . Applies damage to players and mobs, and awards defense XP via the progression service.
member.remarks: Constructs the damage applier with the required progression service.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.DamageApplier.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService)
member.summary: Default implementation of . Applies damage to players and mobs, and awards defense XP via the progression service.
member.remarks: Constructs the damage applier with the required progression service.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.DamageApplier.ApplyDamageToPlayer(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,System.Int32,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState})
member.summary: Applies damage to a player, updates HP, and awards defense XP if applicable.
member.returns: Tuple of reduced damage and amount blocked.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.DamageApplier.ApplyDamageToMob(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState,System.Int32,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState})
member.summary: Applies damage to a mob, updating its HP.
member.returns: Actual damage applied (cannot exceed mob's current HP).

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.IDamageApplier
member.summary: Applies damage to a target actor and records defensive XP.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.IDamageApplier.ApplyDamageToPlayer(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,System.Int32,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState})
member.summary: Applies damage to the target player and returns a tuple of (reduced damage applied, amount blocked). Also awards defense XP to the target as appropriate.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.IDamageApplier.ApplyDamageToMob(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState,System.Int32,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState})
member.summary: Applies damage to a mob and returns the actual damage applied.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.ILootDistributor
member.summary: Responsible for distributing loot (gold) from defeated mobs to alive human players.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.ILootDistributor.DistributeLoot(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState},Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState)
member.summary: Distributes loot for the given mob among alive human players in the context. Returns the total gold awarded.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.IXpDistributor
member.summary: Responsible for awarding skill experience (XP) to players. Extracted from action handlers to centralize XP calculation and related rules.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.IXpDistributor.AwardSkillXp(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.SkillType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Awards XP for a specific skill to the provided player for the given dungeon level. Implementations should avoid awarding XP to bots when appropriate.
member.param: The skill that should receive XP.
Current dungeon level used to scale XP.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.LootDistributor
member.summary: Default implementation of . Uses the existing Calculator to compute gold and splits among alive human players.
Default implementation of . Uses the existing Calculator to compute gold and splits among alive human players.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.LootDistributor.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator)
member.summary: Default implementation of . Uses the existing Calculator to compute gold and splits among alive human players.
Default implementation of . Uses the existing Calculator to compute gold and splits among alive human players.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.LootDistributor.DistributeLoot(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState},Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState)
member.summary: Distributes loot among alive human players. Returns the total gold awarded. Remainder from integer division is intentionally lost for fairness.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.XpDistributor
member.summary: Default implementation of . Delegates XP calculations to .

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.XpDistributor.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService)
member.summary: Default implementation of . Delegates XP calculations to .

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Combat.XpDistributor.AwardSkillXp(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.SkillType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Awards skill XP to a player for using a skill at the given dungeon level. Bots do not receive XP.
member.param: Current dungeon level used to calculate XP amount.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.GameEngine
member.summary: Core game engine that orchestrates combat rounds. Coordinates player actions, bot AI, mob attacks, and round summaries.
member.param: Service for generating round summary messages.
Logger for combat events and diagnostics.

member.summary: Core game engine that orchestrates combat rounds. Coordinates player actions, bot AI, mob attacks, and round summaries.
member.param: Service for generating round summary messages.
Logger for combat events and diagnostics.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.GameEngine.CaptureEarningsSnapshot(System.Collections.Generic.List{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState})
member.summary: Captures a snapshot of player earnings before the round for delta calculation. Only tracks human players (bots don't earn rewards).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.GameEngine.FormatPartyStatusMessage(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Formats the party status message shown at the start of each round.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService
member.summary: Provides localized message text for player and mob actions. Implementations should return human-readable strings used in Discord messages.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetAttackMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message for a normal attack.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetAttackCritMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message for a critical attack.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetAttackNothingMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message when an attack does no damage.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetMagicMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message for a normal magic action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetMagicCritMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message for a magic critical hit.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetMagicNoTargetMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message when magic has no valid target.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetTalkNoTargetMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message when a talk action has no target.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetTalkSuccessMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Message for a successful talk action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetTalkFailMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Message for a failed talk action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetPrayNoTargetMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message when pray action has no valid target.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetPraySuccessMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Message for a successful pray action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetPrayFailMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message for a failed pray action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetPrayHealMessage(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message for a pray that heals the actor.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetRunSuccessMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message for a successful run (escape).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetRunFailMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message for a failed run attempt.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetRunFailOutnumberedMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message for a failed run due to being outnumbered.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetMobAttackMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message describing a mob attacking a player.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetDamageReducedMessage(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message indicating damage was partially reduced/blocked.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetMobKilledMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Message for when a mob is killed by a player.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetPlayerKilledMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Message for when a player is killed by a mob.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetLootMessage(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message announcing loot dropped by a mob.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetLootRemainderMessage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Message indicating remainder gold that was not evenly split.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetPartyLootSummaryMessage(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Short summary of party loot distribution (total gold and alive count).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetHealMessage(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Message for a heal action.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetHealNoTargetMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Message when a heal action has no valid target.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionLocalizationService.GetTeaserMessage
member.summary: Teaser text shown at the start of a level.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionResolutionService
member.summary: Service responsible for resolving combat actions during a round. Dispatches player actions to appropriate handlers and processes mob attacks.
member.remarks: This is the main entry point for action execution during combat. The implementation uses the Strategy pattern to delegate to specialized handlers.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionResolutionService.HandlePlayerAction(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState},Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerAction)
member.summary: Resolves a player's action for the current round. Applies damage, healing, XP awards, and loot distribution as appropriate.
member.param: Combat context containing the actor, all combatants, and message log.
The action the player chose to perform.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionResolutionService.HandleMobAction(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.CombatContext{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.MobState})
member.summary: Resolves a mob's attack action for the current round. Mobs attack a player target, potentially killing them.
member.param: Combat context containing the mob actor, all combatants, and message log.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IBotService
member.summary: Service for generating and managing AI companion bots. Bots fill party slots when there aren't enough human players.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IBotService.GenerateBotsForParty(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState},System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates bot players to fill the party to the minimum size. Bot stats are scaled based on the dungeon level with configurable variance.
member.param: Current list of all players (humans and existing bots).
Current dungeon level, used to scale bot stats.
member.returns: List of new bot players to add to the party. Empty if party is already full.

member.summary: Determines the action a bot should take based on the current combat state. Uses a simple AI decision tree prioritizing support actions when needed.
member.param: The bot player making the decision.
All players in the combat (including bots).
member.returns: The action the bot should take this turn.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator
member.summary: Provides combat-related calculations (damage, success chances, loot). Separates game math from action execution for testability and clarity.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculateAttackDamage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates physical attack damage with critical hit determination.
member.returns: Tuple of (damage dealt, whether it was a critical hit).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculateMagicDamage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates magic damage with critical hit determination.
member.returns: Tuple of (damage dealt, whether it was a critical hit).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculateMobDamage(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates mob attack damage with level scaling and variance.
member.returns: Raw damage before defense reduction.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.ApplyDefenseReduction(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Applies defense reduction to incoming damage.
member.returns: Tuple of (reduced damage, amount blocked). Minimum 1 damage.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculateTalkSuccessChance(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the success chance for the Talk action (diplomacy).
member.param: The target mob's attack power (represents stubbornness).
member.returns: Success chance as percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculatePraySmiteChance(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the success chance for Prayer's divine smite.
member.returns: Success chance as percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculatePrayHealAmount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates self-heal amount when prayer fails.
member.returns: Amount of HP to restore.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculateHealAmount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates heal amount for the Heal action.
member.returns: Amount of HP to restore.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculateRunChance(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates escape chance for the Run action.
member.returns: Success chance as percentage (0-100).

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.CalculateLootGold(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates gold dropped by a defeated mob.
member.param: The mob's attack power (stronger = more gold).
member.returns: Gold amount to distribute.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.RollChance(System.Int32)
member.summary: Rolls a percentage check (0-100).
member.returns: True if the roll succeeded.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.SelectRandomTarget``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Selects a random alive target from a list.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.ICombatCalculator.SelectMobTarget(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState})
member.summary: Selects a mob target with preference for lowest HP player.
member.returns: Selected target or null if none alive.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IGameEngine
member.summary: Core game engine that orchestrates combat rounds. Coordinates player actions, bot AI, mob attacks, and round summaries.

remarks.para: The engine is stateless - all state is passed in and returned via .
Round execution order: Bot Injection ? Player Phase ? Mob Phase ? Round Summary.

member.summary: Executes a single combat round, processing all player and mob actions.
member.param: Current dungeon level (affects scaling and XP rewards).
Current player states. Will be copied internally to avoid mutation.
Actions chosen by players. Players without actions default to Run.
Current mobs in combat. Will be copied internally to avoid mutation.
member.returns: A containing the updated player and mob states, plus a log of all combat messages generated during the round.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService
member.summary: Service for calculating player stats based on individual skill levels. Handles skill-based progression where each skill levels up independently.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService.CalculateStats(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.SkillLevels)
member.summary: Calculates the combat stats for a player based on their skill levels.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService.GetXpRequiredForSkillLevel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the total XP required to reach the specified skill level.
member.returns: Total XP required from level 1 to reach this level.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService.GetXpToNextSkillLevel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the XP needed to advance from the current level to the next.
member.returns: XP required to reach the next level.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService.GetSkillLevelForXp(System.Int64)
member.summary: Determines the skill level for a given total XP.
member.param: The total accumulated XP for this skill.
member.returns: The skill level.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService.CalculateSkillXp(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates XP reward for using a skill successfully.
member.returns: XP to award for the skill.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IPlayerProgressionService.CalculateDefenseXpFromDamage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates Defense XP for taking damage.
member.returns: Defense XP to award.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IRandomNumberGenerator
member.summary: Provides random number generation and helpers for selecting random items from collections.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IRandomNumberGenerator.Next(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a random integer greater than or equal to and less than .
member.param: The inclusive lower bound of the random number returned.
The exclusive upper bound of the random number returned.
member.returns: A 32-bit signed integer greater than or equal to and less than .

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IRandomNumberGenerator.GetRandom``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{``0})
member.summary: Returns a random item from the provided list.
member.typeparam: The element type of the list. Must be a reference type.
member.param: The list to select a random item from.
member.returns: A random item from , or null if is null or empty.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IRandomNumberGenerator.GetRandomAlive``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{``0})
member.summary: Returns a random alive item from the provided list. The element type must implement .
member.typeparam: The element type of the list that implements .
member.param: The list to select a random alive item from.
member.returns: A random alive item from , or null if is null or no items are alive.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.BotPhaseProcessor
member.summary: Handles the bot injection phase of the round, ensuring the party meets the minimum size.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.BotPhaseProcessor.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IBotService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.BotPhaseProcessor})
member.summary: Handles the bot injection phase of the round, ensuring the party meets the minimum size.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.BotPhaseProcessor.InjectBotsIfNeeded(System.Collections.Generic.List{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState},System.Int32)
member.summary: Injects AI companion bots if the party is below the minimum size.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.MobPhaseProcessor
member.summary: Handles the mob phase of the round, where mobs attack players.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.MobPhaseProcessor.#ctor(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.IActionResolutionService)
member.summary: Handles the mob phase of the round, where mobs attack players.
Executes all mob attacks. Dead mobs are skipped. Each alive mob attacks a player (targeting logic is in the mob action handler).

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.PlayerPhaseProcessor
member.summary: Handles the player phase of the round, where players and bots take actions.
Handles the player phase of the round, where players and bots take actions.
Executes all player actions in order. Dead players are skipped. Bots use AI to decide their actions; humans use provided actions or default to Run.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.RoundSummaryGenerator
member.summary: Generates the round summary, including XP and gold earned by players.
Adds a round summary message showing XP and gold earned this round for each human player. Only includes players who earned something during the round.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.RoundSummaryGenerator.EarningsSnapshot
member.summary: Snapshot of a player's earnings at a point in time, used for calculating round deltas.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.Phases.RoundSummaryGenerator.EarningsSnapshot.#ctor(System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Snapshot of a player's earnings at a point in time, used for calculating round deltas.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.PlayerProgressionService
member.summary: Default implementation of .

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.PlayerProgressionService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings})
member.summary: Default implementation of .

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.PlayerStats
member.summary: Calculated combat stats for a player based on their skill levels.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.PlayerStats.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculated combat stats for a player based on their skill levels.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.RandomNumberGenerator
member.summary: Default implementation of that uses .
member.remarks: This implementation delegates to , which is a thread-safe global instance suitable for concurrent use. It avoids explicit locks to provide low-overhead concurrent access. If deterministic sequences are required for testing, consider providing a different implementation of that accepts a seed.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.SkillLevels
member.summary: Represents a player's skill levels.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.SkillLevels.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Represents a player's skill levels.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.SkillLevels.Default
member.summary: Default skill levels for a new player (all level 1).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.SkillLevels.TotalLevel
member.summary: Calculates the "total level" (sum of all skills) for display.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Services.SkillLevels.CombatLevel
member.summary: Calculates the "combat level" - a single number representing overall power.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for AI companion bots that fill party slots.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings.MinimumPartySize
member.summary: Minimum number of players (including bots) required for a combat encounter. Bots will be added to reach this threshold when fewer human players are present.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings.StatLevelVariance
member.summary: Maximum variance (±) applied to bot stats relative to the average human player level. For example, if average player level is 5 and variance is 2, bots will have stats scaled to levels 3-7.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings.BaseHp
member.summary: Base HP value used when scaling bot health. Actual HP = BaseHp + (level * HpPerLevel).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings.HpPerLevel
member.summary: Additional HP gained per level when scaling bot health.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings.BasePower
member.summary: Base power value for attack, magic, speech, and defense stats. Actual power = BasePower + (level * PowerPerLevel).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings.PowerPerLevel
member.summary: Additional power gained per level for attack, magic, speech, and defense stats.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings.MinimumBotLevel
member.summary: Minimum level for generated bots (prevents negative or zero levels from variance).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.BotSettings.BotNames
member.summary: Thematic names for AI companion bots. A random name is selected for each bot.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for combat mechanics. All values can be tuned via appsettings.json under the "Combat" section.

remarks.para: Percentage Convention: All chances/percentages use integers 0-100 (not 0.0-1.0).
Multiplier Convention: All multipliers use doubles (e.g., 2.0 = double damage).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.CriticalHitChance
member.summary: Chance (0-100) for an attack or magic spell to critically hit. Default: 15 (15% chance).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.CriticalHitMultiplier
member.summary: Damage multiplier applied on critical hits. Default: 2.0 (double damage).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.MobTargetLowestHpChance
member.summary: Chance (0-100) that a mob will target the player with the lowest HP. If this check fails, a random alive player is targeted instead. Default: 70 (70% chance to focus low HP targets).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.MobDamageScalingMultiplier
member.summary: Base multiplier for mob damage scaling per dungeon level. Mob damage = BaseDamage × (MobDamageScalingMultiplier ^ Level). Default: 1.05 (5% increase per level, exponential).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.DamageVarianceDivisor
member.summary: Divisor used to calculate damage variance range. Variance = BaseDamage / DamageVarianceDivisor. Actual damage = BaseDamage ± Variance. Default: 4 (±25% variance).
member.example: With 20 base damage and divisor 4: damage ranges 15-25.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.TalkPowerMultiplier
member.summary: Multiplier applied to SpeechPower when calculating talk success. Formula: SuccessChance = (SpeechPower × Multiplier) / (MobPower + Level/2). Default: 1.0 (no modification).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.TalkLevelDivisor
member.summary: Divisor for dungeon level contribution to talk difficulty. Higher values make talk easier at high levels. Formula contribution: Level / TalkLevelDivisor. Default: 2 (level 10 adds 5 to difficulty).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.PraySmiteBaseChance
member.summary: Base chance (0-100) for prayer to instantly kill a mob (Divine Smite). Default: 10 (10% base chance).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.PraySmiteLevelThreshold
member.summary: Level at which prayer success chance starts decreasing. Formula: SuccessChance = BaseChance + (ThresholdLevel - CurrentLevel). Default: 20 (at level 20, only base chance remains).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.PraySmiteMinChance
member.summary: Minimum chance (0-100) for prayer to succeed, regardless of level. Default: 5 (always at least 5% chance).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.PraySmiteMaxChance
member.summary: Maximum chance (0-100) for prayer to succeed, regardless of level. Default: 30 (capped at 30% at low levels).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.PrayHealMaxPercent
member.summary: Maximum percentage (0-100) of MaxHP that prayer self-heal can restore. Actual heal is random from 1 to this percentage of MaxHP. Default: 25 (up to 25% of max HP).
member.example: Player with 100 MaxHP heals 1-25 HP on failed prayer.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.HealPowerDivisor
member.summary: Divisor applied to MagicPower when calculating heal amount. Formula: HealAmount = (MagicPower / Divisor) + Random(Min, Max). Default: 2 (half of magic power contributes to healing).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.HealRandomBonusMin
member.summary: Minimum random bonus added to heal amount. Default: 5.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.HealRandomBonusMax
member.summary: Maximum random bonus added to heal amount (exclusive). Default: 11 (actual max is 10).
member.remarks: This is exclusive, so 11 means random values 5-10.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.RunBaseChance
member.summary: Base chance (0-100) to successfully flee from combat. Default: 40 (40% base escape chance).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.RunLowHpBonus
member.summary: Bonus chance (0-100) added when player HP is below the low HP threshold. Default: 25 (+25% when badly injured).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.RunLowHpThresholdDivisor
member.summary: Divisor to determine "low HP" threshold. Low HP = CurrentHP < MaxHP / Divisor. Default: 3 (below 33% HP is considered low).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.RunOutnumberedBonus
member.summary: Bonus chance (0-100) added when outnumbered by mobs. Outnumbered = MobCount > PlayerCount. Default: 15 (+15% when outnumbered).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.RunMinChance
member.summary: Minimum escape chance (0-100), regardless of penalties. Default: 10 (always at least 10% chance).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.RunMaxChance
member.summary: Maximum escape chance (0-100), regardless of bonuses. Default: 85 (capped at 85% to maintain tension).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.LootBaseGold
member.summary: Base gold amount before level scaling. Default: 5.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.LootPowerDivisor
member.summary: Divisor applied to mob's AttackPower for gold calculation. Stronger mobs drop more gold. Default: 3.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.LootLevelMultiplier
member.summary: Gold bonus per dungeon level. Formula contribution: Level × LootLevelMultiplier. Default: 4 (level 10 adds 40 gold to base).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.CombatSettings.LootVarianceDivisor
member.summary: Divisor for calculating loot variance (random bonus range). MaxGold = BaseGold + (BaseGold / VarianceDivisor). Default: 2 (+50% variance).

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings
member.summary: Settings that contain localized message templates used by . Each list holds possible messages that implementations may choose from at runtime.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.AttackMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for attack messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.AttackNothingMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for messages when an attack hits nothing.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.AttackCritMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for critical attack messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.MagicMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for magic action messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.MagicNoTargetMessages
member.summary: Possible templates when magic has no target.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.MagicCritMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for magic critical messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.TalkNoTargetMessages
member.summary: Possible templates when talk has no target.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.TalkSuccessMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for successful talk messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.TalkFailMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for failed talk messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.PrayNoTargetMessages
member.summary: Possible templates when pray has no target.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.PraySuccessMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for successful pray messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.PrayFailMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for failed pray messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.PrayHealMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for pray heal messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.RunSuccessMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for successful run messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.RunFailMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for failed run messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.RunFailOutnumberedMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for run-fail-when-outnumbered messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.MobAttackMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for mob attack messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.DamageReducedMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for damage reduced messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.MobKilledMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for mob killed messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.PlayerKilledMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for player killed messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.LootMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for loot messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.LootRemainderMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for loot remainder messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.PartyLootSummaryMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for a party loot summary message.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.HealMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for heal messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.HealNoTargetMessages
member.summary: Possible templates for heal-no-target messages.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.LocalizationSettings.Locations
member.summary: Possible location/teaser strings used for level introductions.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for skill-based player progression. Players level up individual skills by using them in combat.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.BaseHp
member.summary: Base HP before Defense level scaling.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.BaseAttackPower
member.summary: Base attack power at Attack level 1.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.BaseMagicPower
member.summary: Base magic power at Magic level 1.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.BaseSpeechPower
member.summary: Base speech power at Speech level 1.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.BaseDefensePower
member.summary: Base defense power at Defense level 1.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.HpPerDefenseLevel
member.summary: HP gained per Defense level. HP = BaseHp + (DefenseLevel - 1) * HpPerDefenseLevel

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.AttackPerLevel
member.summary: Attack power gained per Attack level.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.MagicPerLevel
member.summary: Magic power gained per Magic level.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.SpeechPerLevel
member.summary: Speech power gained per Speech level.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.DefensePerLevel
member.summary: Defense power gained per Defense level.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.BaseSkillXp
member.summary: Base XP awarded for using a skill successfully.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.SkillXpPerDungeonLevel
member.summary: Additional XP per dungeon level when using a skill.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.SkillXpPerLevel
member.summary: XP multiplier for level requirement. Formula: XpToLevel = level * XpPerLevelMultiplier Skill Level 2 = 50 XP, Level 3 = 100 XP, etc.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.MaxSkillLevel
member.summary: Maximum level for any individual skill.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.Settings.ProgressionSettings.DefenseXpPerDamage
member.summary: XP awarded for taking damage (Defense skill). Scales with damage taken.
